---
name: Feature request
about: Request a new feature or user-facing improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: feature
assignees: ""
---

## Context

Describe the user need or business reason.

## Objective

Explain the expected feature.

## Current Behavior

Describe the current situation, if applicable.

## Expected Behavior

Describe the target behavior.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The feature covers the described need.
- [ ] The behavior is clear for the user.
- [ ] Edge cases are handled where necessary.
- [ ] The feature is tested manually or automatically.

## Constraints

- Keep the implementation simple.
- Respect the existing architecture.
- Avoid unrelated changes.
- Add or adapt tests if relevant.

## Technical Notes

Mention likely files, modules, endpoints, components, database changes, or dependencies.
